text:

Log:
  sparc64: Busy the TSB page before freeing it in pmap_release().

  This is now required by vm_page_free().

  PR:	243534
  Reported and tested by:	Michael Reim <kraileth@elderlinux.org>

  head/sys/sparc64/sparc64/pmap.c
